name: Tricorn the Cacophonous Concert
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>響</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>従</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>トライコーン
desc: If a monster(s) in your possession is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 monster in your GY with both the same Type and Attribute as a monster you control; add that monster to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Tricorn the Cacophonous Concert" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a monster(s) in your possession is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 monster in your GY with both the same Type and Attribute as a monster you control; add that monster to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Tricorn the Cacophonous Concert" once per turn.
eff: If a monster(s) in your possession is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 monster in your GY with both the same Type and Attribute as a monster you control; add that monster to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Tricorn the Cacophonous Concert" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
